_paik.notes: DATABASE_URL should be the connection string for exactly one environment's database - run one instance of this server per environment you need live access to, never one shared instance across prod and non-prod.
_paik.deprecation_notes: @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres ships from modelcontextprotocol/servers-archived - it no longer receives security updates. Evaluate a maintained alternative before using this in a real project. For any prod database, wire in a read-only role, masked/audited views, and a credential separate from non-prod - see mcp/README.md's Access model section.
